case_title: TORREY BARRETT VS. FRG MV PINE, LLC.

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT FRG MV PINE, LLC. DBA THE PINNACLE AT NOB HILL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,089.04 FILED BY BARRETT, TORREY AS TO DEFENDANT FRG MV PINE, LLC. DBA THE PINNACLE AT NOB HILL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-18-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-18-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-18-2018 BY PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF TORREY BARRETT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $100.00) SERVED MAR-21-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FRG MV PINE, LLC. DBA THE PINNACLE AT NOB HILL
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY BARRETT, TORREY
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF BARRETT, TORREY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-18-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARRETT, TORREY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRG MV PINE, LLC. DBA THE PINNACLE AT NOB HILL $1,089.04 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,219.04, COURT FINDS DEFENDANT WITHHELD SECURITY IN BAD FAITH AUTHORIZING STATUTORY DAMAGES PER CIVIL CODE 1950.5. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
